member_group_on.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

member_status_code.text: ประเภทสมาชิก

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control)as control_name
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group in ('SHR') then sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no end )as c_mem , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group in ('SHR') then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end )as sum_share
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ก' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_01_ก_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ก' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_01_ก_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ข' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_02_ข_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ข' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_02_ข_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ฉก' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_03_ฉก_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ฉก' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_03_ฉก_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ท' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_04_ท_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ท' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_04_ท_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ป' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_05_ป_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ป' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_05_ป_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ผ' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_06_ผ_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ผ' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_06_ผ_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'พ' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_07_พ_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'พ' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_07_พ_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ร' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_08_ร_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ร' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_08_ร_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ว' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_09_ว_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ว' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_09_ว_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ส' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_10_ส_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'ส' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_10_ส_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สก' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_11_สก_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สก' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_11_สก_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สข' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_12_สข_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สข' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_12_สข_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สค' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_13_สค_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สค' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_13_สค_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สง' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_14_สง_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สง' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_14_สง_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สจ' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_15_สจ_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สจ' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_15_สจ_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สช' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_16_สช_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สช' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_16_สช_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สฐ' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_17_สฐ_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สฐ' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_17_สฐ_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สน' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_18_สน_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สน' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_18_สน_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สบ' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_19_สบ_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สบ' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_19_สบ_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สป' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_20_สป_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สป' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_20_สป_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สพ' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_21_สพ_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สพ' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_21_สพ_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สร' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_22_สร_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สร' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_22_สร_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สส' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_23_สส_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สส' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_23_สส_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สห' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_24_สห_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สห' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_24_สห_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สอ' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end) as loan_25_สอ_contract , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'สอ' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end) as loan_25_สอ_balance
, count(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group in ('LON') then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno end )as c_contract_no , sum(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group in ('LON') then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance end )as sum_balance
from sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where 1=1 and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = to_date('31/08/2025','dd/mm/yyyy') and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group in ('LON','SHR') --and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' /*WHERE*/ group by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control)

r_krabi_sum_sh_loan_balance_nest_norm.sql: SELECT sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance) as c_norm, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ||' '|| sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description as loan_type_description FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_loantype = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) --and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = {0} ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.client_id = '000' ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance > 0 ) and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date = '!balance_date_1!' and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control between '!member_group_control_1!' and '!member_group_control_2!' and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_status_code = '!member_status_code_1!' GROUP BY sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ||' '|| sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description order by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ||' '|| sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description

r_krabi_sum_sh_loan_balance_nest_emer.sql: SELECT sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance) as c_emer, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ||' '|| sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description as loan_type_description FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_loantype = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) --and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = {0} ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance > 0 ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.client_id = '000' ) and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date = '!balance_date_1!' and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control between '!member_group_control_1!' and '!member_group_control_2!' and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_status_code = '!member_status_code_1!' GROUP BY sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ||' '|| sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description order by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ||' '|| sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description

r_krabi_sum_sh_loan_balance_nest_spec.sql: SELECT sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance) as c_spec, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ||' '|| sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description as loan_type_description FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_loantype = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) --and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = {0} ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance > 0 ) and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date = '!balance_date_1!' and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control between '!member_group_control_1!' and '!member_group_control_2!' and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_status_code = '!member_status_code_1!' GROUP BY sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ||' '|| sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description order by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ||' '|| sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description
